title: ComPASS: Towards Personalized Agentic Social Support via Tool-Augmented Companionship
summary: Developing compassionate interactive systems requires agents to not only understand user emotions but also provide diverse, substantive support. While recent works explore empathetic dialogue generation, they remain limited in response f...
